data.title: Write classifier fixture test validating prompt construction and response parsing
data.description:
## Description
Write tests/scripts/test-cross-epic-classifier-fixture.sh — a structural fixture test that validates the cross-epic interaction classifier agent and orchestration logic.

**Test approach (mock boundary pattern, follows complexity-gate.sh)**:
The classifier is a haiku agent invoked via the cross-epic scan orchestration. The test mocks the haiku dispatch boundary by:
1. Asserting the classifier agent file (plugins/dso/agents/cross-epic-interaction-classifier.md) contains the expected JSON output schema (interaction_signals array with required fields: severity, shared_resource, overlapping_epic_id, overlapping_epic_title, integration_constraint)
2. Using fixture files to validate that the expected response format matches the agent's output spec
3. Asserting that the scan orchestration prompt references correct input format (batch of epic stubs)

**Test cases:**

Test 1: URL collision fixture validation
- Load tests/fixtures/cross-epic-classifier/url-collision-stubs.json
- Validate schema: both stubs have id, title, success_criteria fields
- Load tests/fixtures/cross-epic-classifier/url-collision-expected-signal.json
- Validate it matches the classifier agent's output schema (severity is conflict/ambiguity, shared_resource contains 'api/users', has overlapping_epic_id, overlapping_epic_title, integration_constraint)

Test 2: Benign overlap fixture validation
- Load tests/fixtures/cross-epic-classifier/benign-overlap-stubs.json
- Validate schema: both stubs have id, title, success_criteria fields
- Load tests/fixtures/cross-epic-classifier/benign-expected-no-signal.json
- Validate it matches the benign-tier pattern: empty signals array OR signal with severity='benign'

Test 3: Classifier agent output schema completeness
- Assert plugins/dso/agents/cross-epic-interaction-classifier.md exists
- Assert it specifies the 4-tier severity enum (benign, consideration, ambiguity, conflict)
- Assert it specifies required output fields: severity, shared_resource, overlapping_epic_id, overlapping_epic_title, integration_constraint
- Assert it specifies JSON output format (not free text)

Also update .test-index:
- plugins/dso/agents/cross-epic-interaction-classifier.md -> tests/scripts/test-cross-epic-classifier-fixture.sh

Testing mode: GREEN (adding coverage; classifier agent file and fixture stubs must exist first)

## File Impact
- tests/scripts/test-cross-epic-classifier-fixture.sh (CREATE)
- .test-index (UPDATE)

## Dependencies
Blocked by: ccf4-a838 (fixture data files must exist first)
